Off Calendar Apr-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PING XUE'S Motion For Order To Dismiss Case Pursuant To Stipulation Of Settlement.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for order to dismiss case pursuant to stipulation of settlement" is granted. Order is signed. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Motion For Order Approving Stipulation Of Settlement Of Plaintiff Ping Xue?S Claim Under The Labor Code Private Attorneys General Act (Paga)
Off Calendar Feb-10-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. BRUCE J. HIGHMAN, Esq. of Highman & Highman (Tel: 415-982-5563) for plaintiff;
Atty. MARIE TRIMBLE HOLVICK, Esq. of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani, LLP (Tel: 415-986-5900) for defendant Chinese American International School.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PING XUE's Motion For Order Approving Stipulation Of Settlement Of Plaintiff Ping Xue's Claim Under The Labor Code Private Attorneys General Act (PAGA).

Matter argued and submitted. The Court rules as follows: Plaintiff's motion is GRANTED.

Counsel for plaintiff is to prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court after serving the proposed order on counsel for defendant for approval as to form.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
